style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white streak across the air, crackling like miniature lightning bolts that fade into the background. A pulsing violet aura surrounds Aerodactyl, intensifying with each movement, casting a cool neon glow that distorts the air with subtle electromagnetic ripples. The eyes and tail emit sharp, rhythmic flashes of electric yellow, illuminating the scene with a vibrant, high-energy atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
